results.title: Fed interest rate decision April 2026: Fed holds rates steady amid dissent
US Fed holds rates steady, Powell to remain on its board | Al Jazeera
Fed holds interest rates steady for third straight meeting, Powell vows to remain as governor - CBS News
Federal Reserve Board - Federal Reserve issues FOMC statement
Powell confirms he will step aside at end of term but remain on board | CNN Business

summary: Fed held rates at 3.5-3.75% on Apr 29 in 8-4 vote (most dissents since 1992). Powell stepping down as chair May 15 but staying as governor. Kevin Warsh advancing to replace Powell. Elevated inflation and Middle East uncertainty cited.
